reviews.comment:
De 21:45 a 22:40 esperando porque justo fuimos en el cambio de turno.... los playeros "ni mu" decían. colas de 10 autos esperando para cargar combustible en cada lado... Paso de largo nomas

(Translated by Google)
From 9:45 PM to 10:40 PM, I waited because we went right during the shift change... the gas station attendants weren't saying a word. There were lines of 10 cars waiting to fill up on each side... I just drove right past.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtemUzc3NnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Simplemente una critica constructiva: Creo se puede mejorar la atención en el restaurant y el trato para con el cliente. El servicio bien entendido, no consta en despachar gente, sino en brindar un servicio por el cual el cliente paga y se acerca al establecimiento. Es para ser atendido. No le están haciendo un favor. Le están brindando un servicio por el cual, el cliente abona.

(Translated by Google)
Just a constructive criticism: I think the restaurant's service and customer service could be improved. Proper service doesn't consist of sending people away, but rather providing a service for which the customer pays and comes to the establishment. They are there to be served. They are not doing them a favor. They are providing a service for which the customer pays.

reviewReply.comment: Lo tendremos en cuenta Miguel gracias por su comentario
